transcript.text:
[This is Daejeon, Sintanjin-dong]
[A small restaurant that has been here for 40 years]
[A lady stops by]
[Just another customer, right?]
I'll take everything
[This must be a nightmare]
She gives you a lot of food
You can leave leftovers
I'm still hungry
[She has never had a customer like her]
Hello everyone
There's this place that I've been wanting to go in Daejeon
It's a small restaurant with age
Its name is "rest area"
[Heemang Hue-gae-sil (Hope Rest Area)] [Daejeon, Shintanjin]
[You can feel and see its age]

Hello
There are only 2 tables here
It feels very homey
[A briquette heater]
[With their old/original prices]
There were more items on the menu
But I reduced it because I get tired now
Order whatever you want
Really? Whatever I want?
You might get busy if I order whatever I wanted
Go ahead
I'll take everything then
Everything? How will you eat everything?
I'm a good eater
[It's my specialty]
Tteokboki (spicy rice cake), fishcake, dumplings,

Ramyun noodles and Janchi Noodles too
I don't have the broth for Janchi Noodles right now
No bean noodles either then?
Yes
I'll just eat 5 items then since it's only breakfast
Is that too little? It's fine, I'll eat more later
[Tteokboki (spicy rice cake)]
[Fishcake soup]
[Their main dish first!]
How will the 2 of you eat all of this?
It's all for myself
I'm going to eat everything
[Steamed dumplings too]
I'll do it I can help you
That looks good
That's hot!

[You need some more experience for that]
That looks yummy
I can't wait any longer I'm starving
It's been a while since I've seen these rice cakes
Very thin flour rice cake
It's a sweet grandmother-tteokboki
This is a taste of nostalgia
[Bibim guksu (cold sweet & spicy noodles)]
Do you need help making the Ramyun noodles?
It's okay
[Ramyun noodles]
Thank you~
Looks great
Thank you for the food
-The food must've gotten cold -No, it's okay!
Cold tteokboki are tasty too

This really brings me back
Ramyun noodles
Let's eat this first
This is cooked really well
The color looks amazing
This is..
This is so good
This tastes really good
Delicious!
Dumplings now with some soup
She uses a different type of fishcake
The portions here are huge!
This is a lot of food for the price [2,500 Won (~$2.10 USD)]
Check this out
You gave me so much food
People say I need to raise the prices, but...

Yes, you definitely should
There are a lot of fishcakes in here
I love it
Bibim noodles
This is so much food for so little money
I give that much
That's tasty
This is all something like my grandmother used to make me
Sweet & spicy with a little hint of gochujang (red chili paste)
Savory
It's a lot of food and it's really delicious
Thank you
I think I can eat 5 at once
Let's finish this before it gets bloated
The noodles are good even if they get soggy Why is that?
That's good

-I came here to do this when I was in my 30's -Really?
This place holds almost 40 years of tradition
No wonder the ramyun noodles were so good
[She's blushing]
My grand-daughter is now 30 years old
How old do I look?
You look about 20-that
Twenty-that? What's 'that'?
5?
How did you know?!
This tastes really good
1 piece of dumpling
2,500 Won for tteokboki is really cheap And they give you a lot
2,000~3,000 tteokbokis barely have any rice cake
I barely get any profit
You need to make a profit

You can give a little less than this
Then that doesn't seem enough
She has a soft spot
Raise the prices then
I will have to fix it up for you with a sharpie
They used to be 2,000 Won (~$1.68 USD)
The students that used to come here made me raise it to 2,500 Won
That's why it's 2,500 Won now?
Eat up now
Tteokboki goes well with the dumplings
These flour rice cakes tend to get very chewy over time
And I love it
These are good even if they get cold
[I'm used to it]
Thank you
You can barely see it

[A grandmother-granddaughter moment]
It's clean now!
There's still a lot left
Amazing
After some bibim noodles
Some soup
She gave so many fishcakes
[Her friend came to watch Tzuyang eat]
Yes, it's a lot of food for so cheap
The portions are big for every dish
You can leave leftovers
I'm still hungry
6 this time
I've never seen anyone eat this much
First time since I've opened this place up
Something here is spicy

It came out of nowhere
I'm not full yet
I want 1 more ramyun, please
-I'll make 1 for you -Really?
Is it ready?
Thank you
That looks good
It's really yummy
2 dumplings in here
Rest of the soup from this bowl to cool it down a bit
That just looks amazing
It's so good How is it this good?
Why is it so good?
[You were probably hungry]
It's tasty
Is the egg different?

The dumplings are warmed up now
The soup is amazing
It's really good How come?
Did she cast a spell?
It's wonderful
Where's all of that going to?
In my belly
I never knew a skinny person like her can eat so much
This has to be one of the best ramyun noodles I've had recently
I had such a great, nostalgic meal
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
